title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and databases. This course will guide you step by step to build real-world projects and become a job-ready web developer.

title: Advanced JavaScript Mastery
description: Deep dive into modern JavaScript concepts including closures, prototypes, async/await, ES6+, and design patterns. Perfect for developers who want to strengthen their core JavaScript skills and write efficient, scalable code.

title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
description: Learn the fundamentals of UI/UX design, including user research, wireframing, prototyping, and usability principles. This course helps you create intuitive and visually appealing user experiences.

title: React JS Complete Guide
description: Master React.js by building dynamic and high-performance web applications. Learn components, hooks, state management, routing, and best practices to develop modern frontend applications.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Learn how to analyze data, visualize insights, and build predictive models using Python. Covers libraries like NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and basic machine learning concepts.

title: Digital Marketing Essentials
description: Master the fundamentals of digital marketing including SEO, social media marketing, content strategy, and online advertising. Learn how to grow businesses and reach audiences effectively.

title: Node.js Backend Development
description: Build scalable backend applications using Node.js, Express, and REST APIs. Learn authentication, database integration, and deployment strategies for production-ready apps.

title: Graphic Design Masterclass
description: Learn graphic design from scratch using tools like Photoshop and Illustrator. Understand typography, color theory, branding, and create professional design projects.

title: Machine Learning A-Z
description: Master machine learning algorithms, including regression, classification, clustering, and deep learning basics. Build real-world models and understand how AI systems work.

title: Flutter Mobile App Development
description: Learn to build beautiful and high-performance cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter and Dart. Covers UI design, state management, API integration, and app deployment.
